title: Helios — N-Body Studio
description: A real-time gravitational N-body studio: Barnes-Hut O(n log n) solver, SIX integrators including a 4th-order Yoshida symplectic scheme (~10,000× lower energy drift than Verlet at equal Δt), an osculating-orbit overlay that reconstructs the live Kepler ellipse of any body from its eccentricity vector, a restricted-three-body analysis layer drawing the five Lagrange points and the zero-velocity (Hill-region) curves of the Jacobi integral, inelastic collisions & accretion, a shadow-copy orbit forecaster, live energy/momentum/virial diagnostics, fourteen astrophysical presets (figure-eight choreography, Pythagorean three-body, Saturn's rings, Jupiter's Trojans, an eccentric Kepler showcase, co-orbital horseshoes & tadpoles and a hierarchical triple), colour-by speed/mass/acceleration, shareable permalinks, and an in-app numerical self-test that re-derives every physical claim live — all hand-written TypeScript on a Canvas.
